topics.name: Printing Letters
objectives: Print uppercase and lowercase letters correctly

topics.name: Beginning and Ending Sounds
objectives: Write the letter for the beginning and ending sound of a word

topics.name: Spelling Simple Words
objectives: Spell simple short-vowel words phonetically
Spell common sight words

topics.name: Words That Make a Sentence
objectives: Understand that a sentence tells a complete idea
Put words in order to make a sentence

topics.name: Capital Letters to Begin Sentences
objectives: Begin every sentence with a capital letter
Capitalize the word I and names

topics.name: Ending Punctuation
objectives: End sentences with a period, question mark, or exclamation point

topics.name: Naming Words (Nouns)
objectives: Identify nouns as people, places, and things

topics.name: Action Words (Verbs)
objectives: Identify verbs as action words in a sentence

topics.name: One and More Than One
objectives: Add -s to make a noun mean more than one

topics.name: Using I, Me, and We
objectives: Use common pronouns like I, me, we, and they correctly

topics.name: Question Words
objectives: Use who, what, where, when, and why to ask questions

topics.name: Writing a Sentence About a Picture
objectives: Write a complete sentence that describes a picture

topics.name: Writing Sentences That Go Together
objectives: Write two or more sentences about the same topic

topics.name: Telling a Story in Order
objectives: Tell events in order using first, next, and last

topics.name: Complete Sentences
objectives: Write complete sentences with a naming part and an action part

topics.name: Statements and Questions
objectives: Write telling sentences and asking sentences with correct end marks

topics.name: Commands and Exclamations
objectives: Write commands and exclamations with correct end marks

topics.name: Capitalizing Names and Places
objectives: Capitalize proper nouns for people and places

topics.name: Capitalizing Days, Months, and Holidays
objectives: Capitalize days of the week, months, and holidays

topics.name: Common and Proper Nouns
objectives: Tell the difference between common and proper nouns

topics.name: Plural and Irregular Nouns
objectives: Form regular plurals and common irregular plurals like feet and children

topics.name: Verbs and Verb Tense
objectives: Use present and past tense verbs, including adding -ed

topics.name: Adjectives
objectives: Use adjectives to describe nouns

topics.name: Pronouns
objectives: Replace nouns with pronouns so writing is not repetitive

topics.name: Commas in Dates and Lists
objectives: Use commas in dates and in a series of words

topics.name: Apostrophes in Contractions
objectives: Form common contractions such as don't and I'm

topics.name: Spelling Patterns
objectives: Spell words with common vowel patterns and word families

topics.name: Topic Sentence and Details
objectives: Write a topic sentence and supporting detail sentences

topics.name: Writing a Short Paragraph
objectives: Organize a paragraph with a beginning, middle, and closing

topics.name: Writing an Opinion
objectives: State an opinion and give a reason using because

topics.name: Writing a Story
objectives: Write a short narrative with events in order

topics.name: Simple and Compound Sentences
objectives: Write simple and compound sentences
Join two sentences with a conjunction and a comma

topics.name: Fixing Fragments and Run-Ons
objectives: Correct sentence fragments and run-on sentences

topics.name: Combining Sentences with Conjunctions
objectives: Use conjunctions such as and, but, and because to combine ideas

topics.name: Plural and Possessive Nouns
objectives: Form plural nouns and possessive nouns with apostrophes

topics.name: Verb Tenses and Irregular Verbs
objectives: Use correct past, present, and future tenses, including irregular verbs

topics.name: Subject-Verb Agreement
objectives: Make subjects and verbs agree in number

topics.name: Pronouns and Antecedents
objectives: Use pronouns that agree with the nouns they replace

topics.name: Adjectives and Adverbs
objectives: Use adjectives and adverbs to add detail

topics.name: Comparing with Adjectives
objectives: Use comparative and superlative forms such as bigger and biggest

topics.name: Commas in Addresses and Series
objectives: Use commas in addresses and in a series

topics.name: Quotation Marks for Dialogue
objectives: Use quotation marks to show what a character says

topics.name: Capitalizing Titles
objectives: Capitalize important words in titles of books and stories

topics.name: Strong Paragraphs
objectives: Write a paragraph with a topic sentence, supporting details, and a closing

topics.name: Narrative Writing
objectives: Write a story with a clear beginning, middle, and end using descriptive details

topics.name: Opinion Writing
objectives: Write an opinion piece with reasons that support the opinion

topics.name: Informative Writing
objectives: Write to inform, grouping related facts together

topics.name: Revising and Editing
objectives: Revise for clarity and edit for grammar, spelling, and punctuation
